comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-07 after adding Google (AI Studio) provider. Net delta vs prior baseline (2,499,900 B): +74,710 B. Adds @langchain/google-genai chat + embeddings: src/providers/googleProvider.ts (ChatGoogleGenerativeAI stream wrapper) + GoogleGenerativeAIEmbeddings branch in embeddingClient.ts + new 'google' kind in registry/settings/SettingsTab. Bulk of the delta is the @google/generative-ai client pulled in transitively. Cap reset to 30 KB for incremental tuning on top.
